response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer with genuine interest in developer tooling — including hands-on work on a C IDE (NI LabWindows/CVI) and authoring test frameworks and libraries in D — but the core stack for this role is largely absent. His career centers on TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web platforms; Java appears only briefly, Kotlin and the Spring ecosystem not at all, and there is no evidence of deep JVM expertise. For a role demanding strong Java/Kotlin and Spring experience on IDE internals, the gap is too wide despite otherwise impressive breadth and seniority.
strengths: Direct IDE development experience on NI LabWindows/CVI and authored language tooling (test runner, assertion library)
Staff/senior-level experience at large-scale companies with complex, high-throughput systems
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, testing workshops and courses)
concerns: No Kotlin experience and only minor, dated Java exposure
No Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or enterprise JVM framework experience
Career trajectory centers on web/full-stack (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang), not JVM tooling

key_factors.factor: No Spring or enterprise framework experience
